The '''Longprow attack cruiser''' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] used by the [[Iridium Pirates/Legends|Pirates of Iridium]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

==History==
The pirates had two in their possession at the time of their demise. The pirates fitted their [[power gem]] to the front of the Longprow and used the gem's shield-disrupting abilities to smash through the defenses of unsuspecting ships.

The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] assault was led by [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] and the [[Monitor III]], an armed [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|Republic Cruiser]]. One Longprow was destroyed in the battle, but the second was captured intact.
